reviews.comment:
La nafta Infinia está 20$ menos que en BS AS. ( Cargamos en La Adela La Pampa ) nos comentó el.playero que de ahí leyendo hacía el sur está en ese precio ...$97.20 el litro .

(Translated by Google)
Infinia gasoline is $20 cheaper than in Buenos Aires. (We filled up at La Adela La Pampa) The beachcomber told us that reading south from there it's at that price... $97.20 a liter.

reviews.comment:
Buen pan, las Palmeritas muy gruesas y duras. Mucha variedad de productos. Las  Marineras muy ricas. A los chipá les falta, quizás, sal y cocción. Las medialunas muy buenas. Buenos postres individuales.

Recomendable para celíacos atento a que no son productos fáciles de hacer visto el mercado en general.

(Translated by Google)
Good bread, the Palmeritas were very thick and hard. A wide variety of products. The Marineras were delicious. The chipá could perhaps use more salt and be cooked more thoroughly. The medialunas were very good. Good individual desserts.

Recommended for people with celiac disease, but be aware that these products are not easy to make compared to what's generally available on the market.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdl8zUXVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, baños siempre limpios y el autoservicio con mucha variedad, buenos precios y una atención excelente. Lo único a corregir, el acceso para quienes viajan de norte a sur. Debería estar un poco mejor indicado ya que es una zona un tanto peligrosa por la traza de la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, always clean restrooms, and the self-service area offers a wide variety of options, good prices, and excellent customer service. The only thing that needs improvement is the access for those traveling from north to south. It should be better signposted, as it's a somewhat dangerous area due to the road layout.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcjdLY3lRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio estratégica para todos los que viajan a la Patagonia,  pero en los últimos tiempos ha caído mucho en la calidad del combustible y los servicios que ofrece cualquier lugar así.

(Translated by Google)
It is a strategic service station for everyone traveling to Patagonia, but lately the quality of the fuel and the services offered by any such place have fallen a lot.
